surface_verification.runner: uv run --extra dev pytest plugins/shipwright-security/tests -q  +  uv run pytest integration-tests -q  +  boundary round-trip probe (degraded findings.json -> gate decision)
surface_verification.justification: CLI/CI-only change to the OSS scanner backend + the security CI gate; no web/API/UI surface. The cross-tool contract (oss_backend -> findings.json -> security.yml jq gate) is verified by the executed producer->serialize->gate round-trip probe plus integration-tests/test_ci_self_gating.py.

behaviors.behavior: _run_tool records a marker on every None-branch (nonzero_exit/empty_output/timeout/invalid_json/missing_binary); findings stays []
OSSBackend.scan exposes scan_errors; empty on clean, populated on a degraded leg, reset between calls; other legs' findings survive
build_config emits degraded(bool)+scan_errors; degraded independent of findings count
scan.py returns exit 2 when degraded (before --fail-on), writes marker; clean still 0; getattr-default for no-attr backends
degraded/scan_errors round-trip through --input-from-cache (SARIF re-read keeps failing closed)
run_scan_and_report embeds degraded in latest.{md,json} + exits 1; clean exits 0
generate_security_report renders a degraded banner (standard + pr-mode) + json sidecar degraded; clean has none
security.yml critical-gate reads findings.json .degraded and is coupled to exit 1 (fail closed)
end-to-end producer->findings.json->gate: degraded-0-findings BLOCKS, clean-0-findings PASSES
behaviors.evidence: boundary round-trip probe (build_config->json.dumps->re-read->gate decision), executed in Build

behaviors.behavior: real-binary degraded path on Linux CI (gitleaks/semgrep/trivy fatal)
behaviors.evidence: exercised by this PR's CI security.yml run; not unit-mockable
